h224c96ceg9f74g41ebgbf96g354a569b35ba: *A shiver wracks your body. It takes a moment for Wyll to come into focus.*
hda28ed95g78b0g4379g801bg7963c793ebe3: I didn't imagine she would... that it would come to this.
hc33e1a50gc955g4c7agbd2cg3f0b794096f8: All we can do now is *cough* see what the morrow brings.
h32c5574bg757ag4d4ag8c04g6497053e5f3b: *A shiver wracks your body. It takes a moment for Wyll to come into focus.*
hf2497226g4246g4e40g8e53g59da3b7dd592: You've got wits of whitesteel. Can't say I'm not impressed.
hfe1b74b8gfd3ag4a34g95bcgdebb6c151327: *A shiver wracks your body. It takes a moment for Wyll to come into focus.*
h8894f8b0g2ba1g4767gb070ge7a6c145860f: I'm not feeling so good. Like a giant kicked me clear across the Ice Mountains.
h62c7df8bg7693g40c3g868dge1f256476dd8: *You raise your hand to your temples. Your head burns so hot, you think it might scorch your fingers.*
h4a7b59d2g6a9cg498fg8834gf2c85844d2a3: *Has your time come? Will you never earn a silver sword? Will Vlaakith never know your loyalty?*
hc0cb865eg428bg454egbc55g89cd293a1740: And it's not just me, from the looks of you.
ha5637283g0f3cg469fg9830gf79e8a4b92f6: We've been pushing ourselves hard. You're probably just tired.
h51a60bebg2b0ag4463g9fdfgef40a56886b1: Tell that to my bleeding gums and aching bones. You don't think...
hea32c1d9g0d7ag4d35gb4f4g36d14501feee: No. I don't. We still have a chance - don't forget that.
hf99ea368g9c79g4c95gb66ag29d129514d8c: I reckon you're right. The Blade's dodged a blood hawk's talons and felled a death dog by night.
h2eb43c80g3345g4134g9951gb639809a83ed: *Your head swims with the slightest motion, and your legs feel as heavy as iron.*
hee7f8466gee93g4e54gbcd0gc8a31657f667: I reckon come dawn, we'll be *cough* right as rainbows.
h7334741cge7b4g415fg9dd3g8c83ad653fff: ... No way. The Blade's dodged a blood hawk's talons and felled a death dog by night.
h34640d34g886fg47e4g9ce3ge14e9121943b: Can't say it didn't cross my mind.
h94d3c209gfdd6g45ecg89c1g5e63cf9e3e78: But listen here: the Blade's dodged a blood hawk's talons and felled a death dog by night.
hd385396bg09afg4f05g93cbgc7ca1d373f1e: This could be it - the beginning of the end.
h4f86e027g8524g4de0g9420g69321813f65d: I don't know what to think.
h16d3f63agfe45g4aa3g8d3cgcb88896913da: Then think nothing at all. Crawl into your bunk and let the night take you.
hb53b6591ga80cg4c08g86e3g6bcbb4d77db8: The Blade's dodged a blood hawk's talons and felled a death dog by night.
